violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -2 sitting on counter.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Door seal torn on 2 door prep cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside 2 door prep cooler.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --No sanitizer on trailer.
